stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning conflicts is correct ?

options.a: Conflicts are negative in themselves and can only lead to a general detachment of involved parties
options.b: Conflict management involves the participation of all involved parties in finding an acceptable collective solution
options.c: The emergence of a conflict always results from calling into question the general abilities of one of the involved parties
options.d: Whatever the cause of the conflict, its resolution must necessarily involve an additional party if it is to be effective
